description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on pull requests and pushes to all branches except those starting with 'pre-commit-ci'. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions and configurations across different environments, including Ubuntu, Windows, and macOS. For each job, it checks out the code, caches conda and node_modules, sets up Python, installs dependencies, and runs tests with pytest, with specific steps varying based on the matrix configuration.
